title: ZimaBoard 2 Review: Set Up Your Own AI Server (And Run OpenClaw!)
summary: ZimaBoard 2 is a compact server device designed for running local AI applications. The video demonstrates setting up a sovereign AI stack on the hardware by installing OpenClaw, connecting it to Venice AI, and building a Telegram bot for autonomous AI news briefing via Apify.
